---
name: Bug report
about: Something chill-out did (or didn't do) that you didn't expect
title: ''
labels: bug
---

## What happened

A clear, terse description of the actual behavior.

## What you expected

What you thought chill-out would do instead.

## How to reproduce

Minimal command transcript or repository layout that triggers the issue. The smaller the better.

```sh
chill-out check --root path/to/repro
```

## Environment

- chill-out version: `chill-out version`
- Python version: `python --version`
- Ecosystem: pypi / npm
- OS: macOS / Linux / Windows
- Package manager versions, if relevant: `uv --version`, `npm --version`

## Additional context

Logs, config files, screenshots, anything else that might help. If you've already poked around in the source and
have a hypothesis, share it.
